1.name: Minimalist Leather Tote
1.description: Handcrafted from genuine full-grain leather. A versatile companion for your daily commute or weekend getaway.

2.name: Ceramic Pour-Over Set
2.description: Experience the ritual of coffee brewing with this matte black ceramic set. Designed for optimal heat retention.

3.name: Analog Desk Clock
3.description: Stripped back to the essentials. A silent sweep movement mechanism housed in a solid oak frame.

4.name: Merino Wool Scarf
4.description: Ultra-soft, ethically sourced merino wool. Keeps you warm without the bulk.

5.name: Graphite Sketch Set
5.description: Professional grade graphite pencils for the aspiring artist. Encased in a reusable tin box.

6.name: Linen Bed Sheets
6.description: Breathable, stone-washed linen that gets softer with every wash. Cool in summer, warm in winter.
